mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.number, a.icon, a.icon_color, a.seq, a.description, a.cloud_id, b.name AS cloud_name, a.enable_flag, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM t_sys_app a LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud b ON b.id = a.cloud_id
a.cloud_id = #{form.cloudId}
AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.keyword}, '%') OR a.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.id

SELECT a.id AS app_id, a.number AS app_number, a.name AS app_name, a.icon AS app_icon, a.icon_color AS app_icon_color, a.seq AS app_seq, a.description AS app_description, a.enable_flag AS app_enable_flag, a.create_time AS app_create_time, a.update_time AS app_update_time, b.id AS cloud_id, b.number AS cloud_number, b.name AS cloud_name FROM t_sys_app a LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud b ON b.id = a.cloud_id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT b.id AS cloud_id, b.name AS cloud_name, b.number AS cloud_number, b.seq AS cloud_seq, a.id AS app_id, a.name AS app_name, a.number AS app_number, a.icon AS app_icon, a.icon_color AS app_icon_color, a.seq AS app_seq, a.description AS app_description FROM t_sys_app a LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud b ON b.id = a.cloud_id INNER JOIN t_sys_menu c ON c.app_id = a.id INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms d ON d.permission_id = c.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role e ON e.role_id = d.role_id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.seq, a.seq

SELECT a.id AS cloud_id, a.name AS cloud_name, a.number AS cloud_number, a.seq AS cloud_seq, b.id AS app_id, b.name AS app_name, b.number AS app_number, b.icon AS app_icon, b.icon_color AS app_icon_color, b.seq AS app_seq, b.description AS app_description FROM t_sys_cloud a LEFT JOIN t_sys_app b ON b.cloud_id = a.id ORDER BY a.seq, b.seq, b.id

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, b.number AS cloud_number, a.number, a.name, a.icon, a.icon_color, a.seq, a.description FROM t_sys_app a LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud b ON b.id = a.cloud_id INNER JOIN t_sys_menu c ON c.app_id = a.id INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms d ON d.permission_id = c.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role e ON e.role_id = d.role_id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} AND a.number = #{appNumber} LIMIT 1
